dungeon: GENUINE ROTF FACECAM stream (~500s+, 644 f_, 7 dungeon entries) featuring GALACTIC ZONES + shop/vault + event dungeons. The facecam sits in the bottom-left and COVERS the chat box for much of the run (esp. the galactic segment), so readable boss content is limited: the only legible boss lines are BASE-GAME Oryx the Mad God (corroboration). An 'Event hosting dungeons: Mad Labs, Parasite Chambers' announcer line + a Quest/Fame reward are visible. NO ROTF-custom boss recovered here (galactic-segment chat = facecam-covered).
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+f_: a multi-segment FACECAM run — sandy GRID arenas + grey SHOP/VAULT grid menus (t001-t003), a RED/dark dungeon, and dark GALACTIC SPACE/VOID zones (purple/blue starfields, the later t005-t007 entries ~408-498s). Layout is obscured by the facecam + frequent menu screens; no clean single dungeon room-sequence (multi-dungeon + galactic + shop).

bosses.name: Oryx the Mad God
taunts: Gaze at my power, for it shall be your last sight!
Oryx will show no mercy for such insolence toward his grandeur.
You cannot escape from my control!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-coloured 'Oryx the Mad God', grayscale-pull). BASE-GAME RotMG Oryx (O3-style dialogue) -> CANONICAL/no-build, corroboration only. These are the only cleanly legible boss lines (the facecam covers the chat elsewhere).

(4) shop/vault grid menus. Base Oryx dialogue is the only readable boss content.
